_comment: Agentryx Dev Factory — LLM routing config. Edit via Phase 12 admin UI once it ships; direct edits here require a service restart to pick up.
_comment_format: entries in fallbacks[] are 'backend:model' — backend ∈ {openrouter, litellm, direct-openai, direct-anthropic, direct-gemini}. Bare 'model' defaults to backend=openrouter.

triage.description: Classification, routing, quick intent extraction. Cheap tier.

worker.description: Default working model — code gen, doc writing, structured output.

research.description: Long-context web research (Troi). Benefits from huge context windows.

intake.description: Raw scope doc (SRS/FRS/PRD/TOR) → structured requirements extraction. Long context, structured JSON output. Genovi agent (Phase 3).
intake._comment: Flash primary because current OpenRouter balance is tight (402 on 4096 tokens for Pro/Sonnet). Extraction JSON fits easily in 2000 tokens. If credit tops up, promote gemini-2.5-pro back to primary for larger scope docs.
